Interface IJSONConverterGeometry2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides direct access to the Units serialization.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E263189E-4FC0-4FF5-91A1-F5DF7042A77D")]
public interface IJSONConverterGeometry2 : IJSONConverterGeometry
